title.en: The more Ye Tian felt his body, the more excite...

content.en:
"It's too powerful!"

The more Ye Tian felt his body, the more excited he became.

Moreover, his soul will also broke through to the eighteenth dimension in one fell swoop.

And now he can continue to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dimension.

"With my current physical strength, if I enter the Primal Star, will I be able to withstand the tearing power of the Primordial Star?"

Ye Tian was ready to give it a try.

Subsequently, one of his replica bodies traveled to the Primordial Star.

......

Primordial Star.

Ye Tian came here, his body couldn't stop falling towards the Primal Star, and the terrifying tearing force wanted to crush his body, but he resisted.

Until he fell into the Primal Star, he was still alive, but his body was still being damaged, but he still had the secret technique of the Supreme Dimensional Domain of Eternal Immortality, which could allow him to recover from his injuries quickly.

So, he won't fall anytime soon.

Of course, there was no way for his replica body to escape the Primordial Star.

"In the primordial star, the effect of comprehending the supreme dimensional rules is still better!"

He was going to let this replica body stay in the primordial star to comprehend the rules of the supreme dimension.

And he also searched around the Primordial Star, but he didn't find any other figures in the Ninth Realm.

007 "Strange, isn't there any other Ninth Realm to practice here?"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled.

Although the Primal Star is very dangerous, even if he comes in, he can't leave, but there is definitely a ninth realm to leave, such as the Void Immortal Realm Lord I saw at the beginning, the other party's strength is extremely terrifying, and he can definitely enter and exit the Primal Star freely.

"Maybe that kind of strong person has a better place to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dimension!"

Ye Tian could only think so.

He is not in a hurry to help the Ice Leaf Realm Lord, and when his strength is stronger, he will help the Ice Leaf Realm Lord, anyway, at this time, the Ice Leaf Realm Lord can afford to wait.

Time passed, and in the blink of an eye, one hundred thousand domain yuan years had passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian comprehended the thirty-nine supreme dimensional rules, and it took so long to comprehend the supreme dimensional rules from thirty-six to thirty-nine, and he still comprehended them in a place like the Primal Star, and he also used multi-dimensional wisdom light, Xuanlin Mirror and other means.

"It seems that after reaching the thirty-six supreme dimensional rules, the Primal Star will not be of great help to me!" Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, if he spends a lot of years, he can still continue to ascend to the high-dimensional rules.

In these years, he has also created (biaa) some multi-dimensional masteries of the Nine Realms, but in the future, it is not as good as the supreme mastery of the Eight Realms, and it can only be regarded as accumulating the foundation, so as to make efforts to create the supreme mastery of the Nine Realms and the supreme mastery of the Supreme Realm in the future.

In terms of cultivation, he is still in the early stage of the Ninth Realm, and it is impossible for him to ascend in a short period of time.

"I have to help the Lord of the Ice Leaf Realm!"

A copy of Ye Tian's body went to the Ice Leaf Ancient Abyss and met the Ice Leaf Realm Lord.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, congratulations on breaking through to the Ninth Realm!"

The Ice Leaf Realm Lord said with a smile.

"Ice Leaf Realm Lord, when are you leaving?" Ye Tian wanted to settle this matter as soon as possible.

"Now!"

The Ice Leaf Realm Lord immediately said.

"Okay, then let's go to the Peacock Xuanguo Dongyu Mountain!"

Ye Tian and the Ice Leaf Realm Lord immediately set off and headed for the Peacock Xuan Kingdom.

At this moment, they restrained their breath and gradually approached the Peacock Xuanguo, and then infiltrated the Peacock Xuanguo and entered Dongyu Mountain.

Killing the enemy of the Ice Leaf Realm Lord, the Dongyu Realm Lord, in the Peacock Xuan Kingdom, is not easy, and it needs to be resolved quickly.

"Ice Leaf Realm Lord, I will severely damage the Dongyu Realm Lord, and you will kill it. "

Ye Tian said.

"Thank you!" the Ice Leaf Realm Lord said gratefully.

Dongyu Mountain.

Ye Tian came here and directly cast the Eight Realms Supreme Peerless Zhou Tian Multi-dimensional Painting.

Rumble!!!

Zhou Tian's multi-dimensional painting unfolded, and directly photographed the Dongyu Realm Lord who was in the internal formation of Dongyu Mountain.

"Who?"

The Dongyu Realm Lord was shocked, he never expected that he was in the Peacock Xuan Kingdom, and he was even attacked, wouldn't the other party be afraid of the Peacock Realm Lord?

He tried to break through Ye Tian's Zhou Tian multi-dimensional painting, but the terrifying supreme dimensional rules and the power of three hundred and sixty-five multi-dimensional stars bombarded him.

With just one blow, he was hit hard, and then he was restrained in Zhou Tian's multi-dimensional painting, unable to move at all.

"Ice Leaf Realm Lord, Dongyu Realm Lord can't resist anymore, you can make a move!"

Ye Tian said.

The Ice Leaf Realm Lord immediately made a move and killed the Dongyu Realm Lord with one move.

And before being killed, the Dongyu Realm Lord finally knew who was going to kill him.

"Ice Leaf Realm Lord, it's you!"

The Dongyu Realm Lord regretted it, he knew that no matter how big the price was, he would have to ask the Peacock Realm Lord to kill the Ice Leaf Realm Lord!

But he never expected that the Ice Leaf Realm Lord would invite such a terrifying Ninth Realm to kill him.

In an instant, the body of the Dongyu Realm Lord was shattered and completely killed.

And just after the Dongyu Realm Lord was killed, the Peacock Realm Lord sensed it and immediately crossed the dimension to kill.

The Peacock Realm Lord's face changed as soon as the Peacock Realm Lord struck, and if she took this blow, she would definitely be hit hard.

And Ye Tian immediately cast the second Eight Realms Supreme Peerless Sect - the Ten Star Battle Suit.

The ten-star suit easily resisted the attack of the Peacock Realm Lord, and shook the Peacock Realm Lord away.

Followed by.

Ye Tian unleashed the seven-star sword blade with the thirty-nine supreme dimensional rules, and blasted towards the Peacock Realm Lord with one blow.

The Peacock Realm Lord tried his best to resist, and was still pierced by Ye Tian's seven-star sword blade, but such an injury was only a minor injury for the Peacock Realm Lord.

But immediately after, Ye Tian urged the Supreme Dimensional Domain Body with all his strength, and the terrifying physical strength combined with the Eight Realms Supreme Peerless Seven-Star Sword Blade to kill the Peacock Realm Lord again.

Bang!!!!!

The Peacock Realm Lord turned into a huge peacock body and quickly fled, trying to escape, but he was still cut off one of his wings with a single blow.

Just when Ye Tian wanted to continue to move, a touch of breath came across many dimensions.

Ye Tian didn't continue to move, and the wisp of breath dissipated.

Now.

The Ice Leaf Realm Lord was extremely shocked, she originally thought that Ye Tian's strength was about the same as that of the Peacock Realm Lord, but she didn't expect that it was so much stronger than the Peacock Realm Lord, and she easily hit the Peacock Realm Lord.

It's a pity that he didn't continue to do it, otherwise the Peacock Realm Lord wouldn't be able to escape.

"Ice Leaf Realm Lord, I have already helped you kill the Dongyu Realm Lord, and there is nothing for me to do in the future. Don't worry, with my move this time, the Peacock Realm Lord won't dare to do anything to you!" Ye Tian said.

"Thank you Ye Tian Realm Lord!"

The Ice Leaf Realm Lord was grateful.

Wow!

Ye Tian quickly left.

......

Seventeenth dimension.

The battered Peacock Realm Lord stood here, and a phantom shadow was in front of him.

"Thank you Peng Que Realm Lord for your help. "

The Peacock Realm Lord said gratefully.

"I just used my breath to deter that Ye Tian Realm Lord, your subordinates were killed when they were killed, that Ye Tian Realm Lord was very extraordinary, and he was not simple, this was just a clone of him, even I was not sure to kill him. "Pengque Realm is the main way.

"You're not even sure to kill him?"

The Peacock Realm Lord was surprised.
